_comment: PCT-adjacent segments added BY HAND because they were never logged on Madison's Garmin inReach (e.g. trail crew work with the device off). Keyed by the geojson role passed to pct_segments.py ('trailcrew', 'misc'). Each entry is a PCT mile range drawn as a slice of the real centerline: pct_segments.py appends it to that role's map layer (ids suffixed -mNN), bucket_coverage.py unions it into coverage, and centerline.mjs widens its harvest bbox to include it. Mile ranges + notes only - no dates, timestamps, or raw coordinates - so this stays privacy-clean and committable.

trailcrew.note: Carson Pass corridor: from just south of Elephant's Back up through the pass to Meiss Meadow / Upper Truckee River. Trail crew work not captured on the inReach.
Castle Rock area (near Sierra City), ~mile 1238-1244. Trail crew work not captured on the inReach.
